prompt_text:
### Demographics: 78-year-old Asian man

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 13 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes after hyperglycemia symptoms (polyuria, polydipsia, weight loss)
Current symptoms: Postprandial fatigue and thirst noted; no DKA/HHS signs; no recent hypoglycemia

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 4 (15-29)
MASH
Body mass index category: Normal
Diabetic retinopathy
Diabetic Retinopathy
Chronic Obstructive Pulmonary Disease
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 4 (15-29); HF (No); ASCVD (No); MASLD: MASH; BMI Category: Normal
- Family history: Type 2 diabetes (father)
- Social history: Current smoker (20 cigarettes/day for 25 years; ~25 pack-years); No alcohol use

### Medication information
- Current medications: Empagliflozin 10mg once daily; Semaglutide 1mg once weekly; Insulin Glargine 20units once daily; Fluticasone/salmeterol Inhaler (twice daily), Rosuvastatin (10 mg daily), Lisinopril (10 mg daily)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 58.2 kg; Height 166.5 cm; BMI 21.0 kg/m²; Blood pressure 131/88 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 8.3%; 9 months ago 8.6%; 6 months ago 9.1%; 3 months ago 9.6%; current 10.5%), FPG (12 months ago 223mg/dL; 9 months ago 200mg/dL; 6 months ago 230mg/dL; 3 months ago 272mg/dL; current 259mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 56.7kg; 9 months ago 58.8kg; 6 months ago 57.2kg; 3 months ago 57.8kg; current 58.2kg), Height (12 months ago 166.5cm; 9 months ago 166.5cm; 6 months ago 166.5cm; 3 months ago 166.5cm; current 166.5cm), BMI (12 months ago 21.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 21.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 20.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 21.0kg/m²; current 21.0kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 129mmHg; 9 months ago 128mmHg; 6 months ago 132mmHg; 3 months ago 134mmHg; current 131mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 86mmHg; 9 months ago 87mmHg; 6 months ago 86mmHg; 3 months ago 87mmHg; current 88mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 62U/L; 9 months ago 69U/L; 6 months ago 68U/L; 3 months ago 67U/L; current 64U/L), AST (12 months ago 59U/L; 9 months ago 58U/L; 6 months ago 57U/L; 3 months ago 58U/L; current 62U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 0.7mg/dL; 9 months ago 0.6mg/dL; 6 months ago 0.6mg/dL; 3 months ago 0.5mg/dL; current 0.5mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 32mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 28mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 30mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 29mL/min/1.73m²; current 24mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 462mg/g; 9 months ago 527mg/g; 6 months ago 749mg/g; 3 months ago 798mg/g; current 684mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 76mg/dL; 9 months ago 77mg/dL; 6 months ago 76mg/dL; 3 months ago 75mg/dL; current 79mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 45mg/dL; 9 months ago 47mg/dL; 6 months ago 48mg/dL; 3 months ago 45mg/dL; current 46mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 164mg/dL; 9 months ago 148mg/dL; 6 months ago 163mg/dL; 3 months ago 166mg/dL; current 155mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 11.0g/dL; 9 months ago 10.2g/dL; 6 months ago 10.0g/dL; 3 months ago 10.0g/dL; current 9.7g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Not measured (Current); fasting C-peptide 1.11 ng/mL (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Very poor adherence (estimated <50%); SMBG rarely performed; lifestyle control severely limited.
Financial context: Patient has standard insurance with moderate copays and a monthly medication budget of ≤ KRW 500,000.
